name: shaelz/stage-gate
description: A typed import pipeline: proof, stage, review, approve, publish.

suggest.spatie/laravel-package-tools: Required to use the Laravel wrapper (StageGate\Laravel).
suggest.illuminate/database: Required to use the Laravel wrapper's Eloquent models and migrations.
suggest.illuminate/support: Required to use the Laravel wrapper's service provider.
suggest.illuminate/bus: Required to use the Laravel wrapper's queued ProofAndStageJob/PublishJob.
